title: hi! not a question but I wanted to share a short film that could be very interesting to anyone who resonated with the migrant scenes - there are a few very similar shots in there that I was reminded of when watching the last episode, and it really is a gorgeous film that I would urge everybody to watch it to expand your intellectual curiosity and obscure film-making the film is called Victoria para chino (made by Cary Joji Fukunaga), it’s only 13 minutes long, and it’s on youtube in full!!
